hero.heading: Gapflow and Gmail
hero.subheading: Automate email workflows and communication processes with Google's email service

documentation.title: Getting Started with Gmail
documentation.description: Connect Gmail to Gapflow and learn how to automate email sending, filtering, and processing workflows.

documentation.title: Email Parsing & Data Extraction
documentation.description: Extract structured data from emails using templates, regex patterns, and AI-powered content analysis.

documentation.title: Advanced Email Automation
documentation.description: Master thread management, batch operations, and sophisticated email workflows for business automation.

tutorials.title: Automated Support Ticketing
tutorials.description: Build a system that converts support emails into tickets, routes by priority, and sends automatic acknowledgments.

tutorials.title: Lead Capture & Nurture
tutorials.description: Create workflows that capture leads from email inquiries, enrich data, and trigger automated follow-up sequences.

tutorials.title: Invoice & Receipt Processing
tutorials.description: Set up automated processing for financial emails that extracts data, stores attachments, and updates accounting systems.

faqs.question: How do I connect Gmail?
faqs.answer: Sign in with your Google account and authorize Gapflow. Works with personal Gmail and Google Workspace accounts.

faqs.question: Can I send emails from my address?
faqs.answer: Yes! Send emails that appear from your Gmail address. Perfect for automated responses and notifications that look personal.

faqs.question: How do I filter specific emails?
faqs.answer: Use triggers based on sender, subject, labels, attachments, or content. Build sophisticated filters with multiple conditions.

faqs.question: What about attachments?
faqs.answer: Download, process, and save attachments automatically. Extract data from PDFs, parse spreadsheets, and handle any file type.

faqs.question: Can I use email templates?
faqs.answer: Yes! Create reusable email templates with variables, personalization, and dynamic content for consistent messaging.

faqs.question: What are the sending limits?
faqs.answer: Gmail has daily sending limits (500 for free, 2000 for Workspace). Implement queuing and scheduling for high-volume needs.

testimonials.quote: Support ticket creation is fully automated. Every email becomes a tracked ticket instantly with no manual work.
testimonials.author: Rachel Green

testimonials.quote: Lead capture increased 40%. Every inquiry is in our CRM within seconds with complete email history.
testimonials.author: Tom Anderson

testimonials.quote: Invoice processing used to take hours. Now it's automatic - extract, categorize, and log in 30 seconds.
testimonials.author: Maria Santos

testimonials.quote: Email automation handles 1000+ messages daily. Routing, labeling, responding - all happens perfectly.
testimonials.author: Kevin Park

limits.title: Sending Limits
limits.description: 500 emails/day for free Gmail, 2000 for Workspace. Implement rate limiting and queuing for bulk sending operations.

limits.title: Attachment Size
limits.description: 25MB per email including attachments. Large files should be shared via Drive links instead of direct attachments.

limits.title: API Quotas
limits.description: Gmail API has per-user quotas for requests. Use batch operations and implement appropriate throttling for efficiency.

limits.title: Storage Space
limits.description: 15GB shared across Gmail, Drive, and Photos for free accounts. Monitor usage and implement archival strategies.
